'''Tempest Scout 5''' was an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] in [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]. It used experimental command and control software to coordinate combat data. It participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], where it was destroyed along with the rest of the AT-ST's, apart from [[Tempest Scout 2/Legends|Tempest Scout 2]].
